name: Deploy CloudFormation

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev
      - test
      - auto
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - auto
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy CloudFormation Stack
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      id-token: write
      contents: read
    env:
      STACK_NAME: "aws-365-template"
      AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
      AWS_ROLE_TO_ASSUME: ${{ secrets.AWS_DEPLOY_ROLE_ARN }}
      AWS_BUCKET_NAME: "aws-365" # name should match the bucket name in main, other stacks, and in the powershell scripts as well
      AWS_BUCKET_PATH: "cf-templates"
      AWS_BUDGET_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_BUDGET_REGION }}
      AWS_BUDGET_LIMIT: ${{ secrets.AWS_BUDGET_LIMIT }}
      AWS_BUDGET_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.AWS_BUDGET_EMAIL }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configure AWS Credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ env.AWS_ROLE_TO_ASSUME }}
          role-session-name: github-actions-cf-deploy
          aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Create S3 Bucket if not exists
        run: |
          if ! aws s3api head-bucket --bucket ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME} 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "Creating S3 bucket: ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME} in region: ${AWS_REGION}"
            if [ "${AWS_REGION}" == "us-east-1" ]; then
              # us-east-1 doesn't require LocationConstraint
              aws s3api create-bucket --bucket ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}
            else
              # All other regions require LocationConstraint
              aws s3api create-bucket \
                --bucket ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME} \
                --region ${AWS_REGION} \
                --create-bucket-configuration LocationConstraint=${AWS_REGION}
            fi
            echo "✅ S3 bucket created successfully"
          else
            echo "✅ S3 bucket ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME} already exists"
          fi

      - name: Upload CloudFormation Templates to S3
        run: |
          echo "Uploading CloudFormation templates..."
          for file in $(find ./infrastructure/cf-templates -type f -name '*.yml'); do
              echo "Uploading template: $(basename $file)"
              aws s3 cp $file s3://${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}/${AWS_BUCKET_PATH}/$(basename $file)
          done
          echo "✅ All CloudFormation templates uploaded"

      - name: Upload PowerShell Scripts to S3
        run: |
          echo "Uploading PowerShell automation scripts..."
          for file in $(find ./infrastructure/automation/scripts -type f -name '*.ps1'); do
              echo "Uploading script: $(basename $file)"
              aws s3 cp $file s3://${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}/scripts/$(basename $file)
          done
          echo "✅ All PowerShell scripts uploaded"

      - name: Upload License Files (if any)
        run: |
          if [ -d "./licenses" ] && [ "$(find ./licenses -name '*.lic' | wc -l)" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "License files found, uploading to S3..."
            for file in $(find ./licenses -type f -name '*.lic'); do
                echo "Uploading license: $(basename $file)"
                aws s3 cp $file s3://${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}/licenses/$(basename $file)
            done
            echo "✅ All license files uploaded"
          else
            echo "ℹ️  No license files found in ./licenses folder - upload licenses to s3://${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}/licenses/"
          fi

      - name: Create or Update with ChangeSet
        run: |
          echo "Checking if stack exists..."
          if aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name $STACK_NAME >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            ACTION_TYPE="UPDATE"
          else
            ACTION_TYPE="CREATE"
          fi

          CHANGE_SET_NAME="SafeChangeSet-$(date +%s%N)"

          echo "Creating $ACTION_TYPE ChangeSet: $CHANGE_SET_NAME"
          aws cloudformation create-change-set \
            --stack-name $STACK_NAME \
            --change-set-name $CHANGE_SET_NAME \
            --template-body file://./infrastructure/cf-templates/main.yml \
            --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND \
            --parameters \
              ParameterKey=BucketPath,ParameterValue=https://s3.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com/${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}/${AWS_BUCKET_PATH} \
              ParameterKey=BucketName,ParameterValue=${AWS_BUCKET_NAME} \
            --change-set-type $ACTION_TYPE

          echo "Waiting for ChangeSet to be created..."
          if aws cloudformation wait change-set-create-complete --stack-name $STACK_NAME --change-set-name $CHANGE_SET_NAME; then
            echo "✅ ChangeSet created successfully. Showing changes:"
            aws cloudformation describe-change-set \
              --stack-name $STACK_NAME \
              --change-set-name $CHANGE_SET_NAME \
              --query "Changes[*].[Action,ResourceChange.LogicalResourceId,ResourceChange.ResourceType]" \
              --output table

            echo "Executing ChangeSet..."
            aws cloudformation execute-change-set \
              --stack-name $STACK_NAME \
              --change-set-name $CHANGE_SET_NAME

            echo "Waiting for stack operation to complete..."
            if [ "$ACTION_TYPE" == "CREATE" ]; then
              aws cloudformation wait stack-create-complete --stack-name $STACK_NAME
            else
              aws cloudformation wait stack-update-complete --stack-name $STACK_NAME
            fi
            echo "✅ Stack $ACTION_TYPE completed."
            echo "📋 To change Veeam deployment mode, update the VeeamDeploymentMode parameter in CloudFormation"

          else
            echo "❌ ChangeSet creation failed. Fetching failure reason:"
            FAILURE_REASON=$(aws cloudformation describe-change-set \
              --stack-name $STACK_NAME \
              --change-set-name $CHANGE_SET_NAME \
              --query "StatusReason" \
              --output text 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not retrieve failure reason")
            
            echo "Failure reason: $FAILURE_REASON"
            
            # Check if it's just "no changes" scenario
            if echo "$FAILURE_REASON" | grep -q "didn't contain changes\|No updates"; then
              echo "ℹ️  No changes detected in template - this is normal"
              exit 0
            else
              echo "❌ ChangeSet creation failed with error"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

      - name: Deploy Budget Stack in us-east-1
        run: |
          aws cloudformation deploy \
            --template-file ./infrastructure/cf-templates/budget.yml \
            --stack-name aws365-budget-stack \
            --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM \
            --region ${{ env.AWS_BUDGET_REGION }} \
            --parameter-overrides \
              BudgetLimit=${{ env.AWS_BUDGET_LIMIT }} \
              NotificationEmail=${{ env.AWS_BUDGET_EMAIL }}
